getProcessDefinitions.name: processDefinition_list
getProcessDefinitions.description: List deployed process definitions. Filter by key, name, version, category, or tenant. Returns key, id, version, and deployment info for each definition.
examples: List all versions of 'loan-approval' process key

getProcessDefinitionsCount.name: processDefinition_count
getProcessDefinitionsCount.description: Count deployed process definitions matching filter criteria. Supports same filters as list. Use before listing to plan pagination.

getProcessDefinition.name: processDefinition_getById
getProcessDefinition.description: Retrieve a single process definition by its unique ID. Returns full metadata: key, version, deployment ID, resource name, and tenant.

getProcessDefinitionByKey.name: processDefinition_getByKey
getProcessDefinitionByKey.description: Retrieve the latest deployed version of a process definition by its key. Returns full metadata including version, deployment ID, and start form key.

deleteProcessDefinition.name: processDefinition_deleteById
deleteProcessDefinition.description: Delete a process definition by ID. Set cascade=true to also delete running instances, history, and jobs. Fails if instances exist and cascade is false.

deleteProcessDefinitionsByKey.name: processDefinition_deleteByKey
deleteProcessDefinitionsByKey.description: Delete all versions of a process definition by key. Set cascade=true to remove all instances and history. Fails if active instances exist and cascade is false.

startProcessInstance.name: processInstance_startById
startProcessInstance.description: Start a new process instance by process definition ID. Use when a specific definition version is required. Returns instance ID, state, and definition info.

startProcessInstanceByKey.name: processInstance_start
startProcessInstanceByKey.description: Start a new process instance by definition key (latest version). Accepts optional business key and typed variables. Returns instance ID, state, and definition info.
examples: Start 'loan-approval' with businessKey 'loan-001' and amount variable

getProcessDefinitionBpmn20Xml.name: processDefinition_getXmlById
getProcessDefinitionBpmn20Xml.description: Retrieve the BPMN 2.0 XML source of a process definition by ID. Useful for inspecting or debugging process models.

getProcessDefinitionBpmn20XmlByKey.name: processDefinition_getXmlByKey
getProcessDefinitionBpmn20XmlByKey.description: Retrieve the BPMN 2.0 XML source of the latest deployed version of a process definition by key.

getActivityStatistics.name: processDefinition_activityStats
getActivityStatistics.description: Get activity-level statistics for a process definition: instance counts per activity, failed job counts, and incident counts. Useful for bottleneck analysis.

getProcessDefinitionStatistics.name: processDefinition_statistics
getProcessDefinitionStatistics.description: Get process definition statistics across all deployed definitions: instance counts, failed job counts, and incident counts per definition.

updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.name: processDefinition_suspendByKey
updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.description: Suspend or activate a process definition by key. Suspended definitions cannot be started. Set includeProcessInstances=true to also suspend all running instances.

updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.name: processDefinition_suspendById
updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.description: Suspend or activate a specific version of a process definition by ID. Suspended definitions cannot start new instances.
updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.reason: Redundant with processDefinition_suspendByKey for most operator use cases

updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionState.name: processDefinition_suspend
updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionState.description: Suspend or activate all versions of a process definition by key or ID with optional scheduled execution time.

getDeployedStartForm.name: processDefinition_getStartFormById
getDeployedStartForm.description: Retrieve the deployed start form for a process definition by ID. Returns the form schema for the user task start event.
getDeployedStartForm.reason: Low AI value — forms are UI artifacts

getDeployedStartFormByKey.name: processDefinition_getStartFormByKey
getDeployedStartFormByKey.description: Retrieve the deployed start form for the latest version of a process definition by key.
getDeployedStartFormByKey.reason: Low AI value — forms are UI artifacts

getStartForm.name: processDefinition_getStartFormRef
getStartForm.description: Get the form key reference for the start event of a process definition by ID.
getStartForm.reason: Low AI value — returns form key only

getStartFormByKey.name: processDefinition_getStartFormRefByKey
getStartFormByKey.description: Get the form key reference for the start event of the latest process definition version by key.
getStartFormByKey.reason: Low AI value — returns form key only

getStartFormVariables.name: processDefinition_getStartFormVarsById
getStartFormVariables.description: Retrieve process variables used to pre-populate the start form for a process definition by ID.
getStartFormVariables.reason: Low AI value — use startProcessInstance directly

getStartFormVariablesByKey.name: processDefinition_getStartFormVarsByKey
getStartFormVariablesByKey.description: Retrieve process variables used to pre-populate the start form for a process definition by key.
getStartFormVariablesByKey.reason: Low AI value — use startProcessInstance directly

getRenderedStartForm.name: processDefinition_getRenderedFormById
getRenderedStartForm.description: Retrieve the rendered HTML start form for a process definition by ID.
getRenderedStartForm.reason: Low AI value — HTML forms are not useful for AI agents

getRenderedStartFormByKey.name: processDefinition_getRenderedFormByKey
getRenderedStartFormByKey.description: Retrieve the rendered HTML start form for a process definition by key.
getRenderedStartFormByKey.reason: Low AI value — HTML forms are not useful for AI agents

submitForm.name: processDefinition_submitFormById
submitForm.description: Submit a start form to start a process instance. Use startProcessInstance instead for AI agent use.
submitForm.reason: Use processDefinition_startById — form submission not needed for AI

getProcessDefinitionDiagram.name: processDefinition_getDiagramById
getProcessDefinitionDiagram.description: Retrieve the process diagram image for a process definition by ID.
getProcessDefinitionDiagram.reason: Binary image data not useful for AI text agents

getProcessDefinitionDiagramByKey.name: processDefinition_getDiagramByKey
getProcessDefinitionDiagramByKey.description: Retrieve the process diagram image for the latest version of a process definition by key.
getProcessDefinitionDiagramByKey.reason: Binary image data not useful for AI text agents

updateHistoryTimeToLiveByProcessDefiniti.name: processDefinition_setHistoryTtlById
updateHistoryTimeToLiveByProcessDefiniti.description: Update the history time-to-live (in days) for a specific process definition version by ID. Controls how long historic instances are retained.

updateHistoryTimeToLiveByProcessDefiniti.name: processDefinition_setHistoryTtlByKey
updateHistoryTimeToLiveByProcessDefiniti.description: Update the history time-to-live (in days) for all versions of a process definition by key. Controls historic data retention.

restartProcessInstance.name: processDefinition_restartInstances
restartProcessInstance.description: Restart one or more process instances for a process definition. Use to re-execute failed or completed instances from a given activity.

getStaticCalledProcessDefinitions.name: processDefinition_getCalledProcesses
getStaticCalledProcessDefinitions.description: List all process definitions statically called (via call activity) by a given process definition ID. Useful for dependency analysis.

getDeployments.name: deployment_list
getDeployments.description: List deployments in the engine. Filter by name, source, deployment time range, or tenant. Returns deployment ID, name, and time for each deployment.
examples: List all deployments from the last 7 days

getDeploymentsCount.name: deployment_count
getDeploymentsCount.description: Count deployments matching filter criteria. Supports same filters as deployment list.

deleteDeployment.name: deployment_delete
deleteDeployment.description: Delete a deployment by ID. Set cascade=true to also delete running instances and history. Use skipCustomListeners and skipIoMappings to bypass lifecycle hooks.

getDeployment.name: deployment_getById
getDeployment.description: Retrieve a deployment by its ID. Returns deployment name, source, time, and tenant ID.

getDeploymentResources.name: deployment_listResources
getDeploymentResources.description: List all resources (BPMN files, DMN files, forms) included in a deployment by deployment ID.

getDeploymentResource.name: deployment_getResource
getDeploymentResource.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific resource within a deployment by deployment ID and resource ID.

getDeploymentResourceData.name: deployment_getResourceData
getDeploymentResourceData.description: Download the binary content of a deployment resource (e.g. BPMN XML).
getDeploymentResourceData.reason: Binary content not suitable for AI text agents; use processDefinition_getXmlByKey instead

redeploy.name: deployment_redeploy
redeploy.description: Redeploy an existing deployment, optionally selecting specific resources. Creates a new deployment from resources of a previous deployment.

getRegisteredDeployments.name: deployment_listRegistered
getRegisteredDeployments.description: List deployments registered with the process engine cluster. Used for cluster management in distributed deployments.
getRegisteredDeployments.reason: Cluster management operation with limited AI operator value

deleteProcessDefinitionsByKeyAndTenantId.name: processDefinition_deleteByKeyAndTenant
deleteProcessDefinitionsByKeyAndTenantId.description: Delete all versions of a process definition by key and tenant ID in a multi-tenant setup.

getLatestProcessDefinitionByTenantId.name: processDefinition_getByKeyAndTenant
getLatestProcessDefinitionByTenantId.description: Retrieve the latest process definition version by key and tenant ID.

startProcessInstanceByKeyAndTenantId.name: processDefinition_startByKeyAndTenant
startProcessInstanceByKeyAndTenantId.description: Start a process instance from the latest version of a process definition for a specific key and tenant.

updateHistoryTimeToLiveByProcessDefiniti.name: processDefinition_setHistoryTtlByKeyAndTenant
updateHistoryTimeToLiveByProcessDefiniti.description: Update history time-to-live for a process definition by key and tenant.

getProcessDefinitionBpmn20XmlByKeyAndTen.name: processDefinition_getXmlByKeyAndTenant
getProcessDefinitionBpmn20XmlByKeyAndTen.description: Retrieve BPMN XML for a process definition by key and tenant.

getDeployedStartFormByKeyAndTenantId.name: processDefinition_getStartFormByKeyAndTenant
getDeployedStartFormByKeyAndTenantId.description: Retrieve the start form for a process definition by key and tenant.

getProcessDefinitionDiagramByKeyAndTenan.name: processDefinition_getDiagramByKeyAndTenant
getProcessDefinitionDiagramByKeyAndTenan.description: Retrieve the process diagram for a definition by key and tenant.
getProcessDefinitionDiagramByKeyAndTenan.reason: Binary image data not useful for AI text agents

getStartFormVariablesByKeyAndTenantId.name: processDefinition_getStartFormVarsByKeyAndTenant
getStartFormVariablesByKeyAndTenantId.description: Retrieve start form variables for a process definition by key and tenant.

getRenderedStartFormByKeyAndTenantId.name: processDefinition_getRenderedFormByKeyAndTenant
getRenderedStartFormByKeyAndTenantId.description: Retrieve the rendered HTML start form by key and tenant.

updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.name: processDefinition_suspendByKeyAndTenant
updateProcessDefinitionSuspensionStateBy.description: Suspend or activate a process definition by key and tenant ID.

getActivityStatisticsByProcessDefinition.name: processDefinition_activityStatsByKey
getActivityStatisticsByProcessDefinition.description: Get activity-level statistics for a process definition by key: instance counts per activity, failed job counts, and incident counts.
getActivityStatisticsByProcessDefinition.reason: Use processDefinition_activityStats (by ID) for specific version analysis

getActivityStatisticsByProcessDefinition.name: processDefinition_activityStatsByKeyAndTenant
getActivityStatisticsByProcessDefinition.description: Get activity statistics by key and tenant.

restartProcessInstanceAsyncOperation.name: processDefinition_restartInstancesAsync
restartProcessInstanceAsyncOperation.description: Restart process instances asynchronously (returns a batch job). Use when restarting many instances to avoid timeout.

submitFormByKeyAndTenantId.name: processDefinition_submitFormByKeyAndTenant
submitFormByKeyAndTenantId.description: Submit start form by key and tenant.

claim.name: task_claim
claim.description: Claim a user task for the specified user. After claiming, the task is assigned to that user and removed from candidate group queues.

unclaim.name: task_unclaim
unclaim.description: Unclaim a user task, removing the current assignee. The task returns to the candidate group queue and can be claimed by another user.
examples: Unclaim task 'abc123' so another user can pick it up

complete.name: task_complete
complete.description: Complete a user task, advancing the process to the next step. Optionally provide output variables to pass to the process. Returns confirmation.

delegateTask.name: task_delegate
delegateTask.description: Delegate a user task to another user. The original owner retains ownership but the delegated user can complete it. Use for escalation workflows.

setAssignee.name: task_setAssignee
setAssignee.description: Directly assign a user task to a specific user without going through the claim workflow. Overwrites any existing assignee.

createTask.name: task_create
createTask.description: Create a standalone user task not attached to a process instance. Useful for ad-hoc work items. Provide name, assignee, priority, and due date.

updateTask.name: task_update
updateTask.description: Update metadata of a user task: name, description, assignee, due date, priority, or parent task. Does not advance the task in the workflow.

deleteTask.name: task_delete
deleteTask.description: Delete a standalone user task (not part of an active process). Only applicable to manually created tasks. Process-owned tasks must be handled via process management.

getTaskVariables.name: task_getVariables
getTaskVariables.description: Retrieve all variables associated with a user task. Returns variables from task scope and parent process scope.

modifyTaskVariables.name: task_setVariables
modifyTaskVariables.description: Add or update multiple variables on a user task. Variables set here are available in the process after task completion. Provide typed variable values.

getTaskVariable.name: task_getVariable
getTaskVariable.description: Retrieve a single named variable from a user task scope.

putTaskVariable.name: task_setVariable
putTaskVariable.description: Set a single named variable on a user task.

deleteTaskVariable.name: task_deleteVariable
deleteTaskVariable.description: Delete a named variable from a user task scope.

getTaskLocalVariables.name: task_getLocalVariables
getTaskLocalVariables.description: Retrieve task-local variables (only visible within task scope, not propagated to process).

modifyTaskLocalVariables.name: task_setLocalVariables
modifyTaskLocalVariables.description: Add or update task-local variables scoped only to this task. Not propagated to the process after completion.

resolve.name: task_resolve
resolve.description: Resolve a delegated task, returning ownership to the original owner. Use after the delegate has completed their work to restore normal ownership.

handleBpmnError.name: task_throwBpmnError
handleBpmnError.description: Throw a BPMN error from a user task, triggering the boundary error event on the process. Use to signal an exceptional condition during task execution.

handleEscalation.name: task_throwEscalation
handleEscalation.description: Throw a BPMN escalation from a user task, triggering the boundary escalation event. Use to escalate a task to a higher authority in the process.

queryTasks.name: task_query
queryTasks.description: Query user tasks using POST body for complex filter criteria. Equivalent to list but supports larger filter sets and variable value filtering.

queryTasksCount.name: task_queryCount
queryTasksCount.description: Count user tasks matching POST body filter criteria.

getIdentityLinks.name: task_getIdentityLinks
getIdentityLinks.description: Retrieve candidate users and groups associated with a user task. Returns all identity link associations.

addIdentityLink.name: task_addIdentityLink
addIdentityLink.description: Add a candidate user or group to a user task's identity links.

deleteIdentityLink.name: task_deleteIdentityLink
deleteIdentityLink.description: Remove a candidate user or group from a user task's identity links.

getTaskCountByCandidateGroup.name: task_countByCandidateGroup
getTaskCountByCandidateGroup.description: Report task counts grouped by candidate group. Use to see workload distribution across teams.

getTasks.name: task_list
getTasks.description: Query user tasks with rich filtering: by assignee, candidate group, process instance, variables, due date, and more. Returns task metadata for operator review.
examples: Find all unassigned tasks in the 'loan-review' process

getTask.name: task_getById
getTask.description: Retrieve a single user task by its ID. Returns task name, assignee, due date, priority, and process instance.

getTasksCount.name: task_count
getTasksCount.description: Count user tasks matching filter criteria. Supports same filters as task list. Useful for workload sizing.

getIncidents.name: incident_list
getIncidents.description: List active incidents in the engine. Filter by type, message, process definition, or activity. Incidents indicate failed jobs, failed scripts, or custom conditions.
examples: List all failedJob incidents for process key 'loan-approval'

getIncident.name: incident_getById
getIncident.description: Retrieve a single incident by ID. Returns type, message, cause, root cause, process definition ID, and activity ID.

getIncidentsCount.name: incident_count
getIncidentsCount.description: Count active incidents matching filter criteria. Use to gauge operational health before investigating individual incidents.

resolveIncident.name: incident_resolve
resolveIncident.description: Resolve an incident by ID, clearing the error state and allowing the process to continue or be retried. Only applicable to custom incident types.
examples: Resolve incident 'abc123' after fixing the underlying issue

setIncidentAnnotation.name: incident_setAnnotation
setIncidentAnnotation.description: Add or update a human-readable annotation on an incident. Use to document the investigation status or root cause for team visibility.

clearIncidentAnnotation.name: incident_clearAnnotation
clearIncidentAnnotation.description: Remove the annotation from an incident.

getJobs.name: job_list
getJobs.description: List jobs with optional filters: process instance, job definition, exception presence, retries, and due date range. Returns id, type, retries, dueDate, and exceptionMessage.

getJobsCount.name: job_count
getJobsCount.description: Count jobs matching filter criteria. Use to assess backlog size before listing.

getJob.name: job_get
getJob.description: Retrieve a single job by ID. Returns id, type, retries, dueDate, exceptionMessage, and process instance details.

executeJob.name: job_triggerExecution
executeJob.description: Trigger immediate execution of a specific job. Use to manually run a scheduled or async job without waiting for its due date.
examples: Force execute timer job 'abc123' to test its implementation

updateJobSuspensionState.name: job_setSuspension
updateJobSuspensionState.description: Suspend or resume a specific job by ID. Suspended jobs will not be executed by the job executor. Resume to re-enable execution.

setJobRetries.name: job_setRetries
setJobRetries.description: Set the retry count for a failed job. Use to reset retries after fixing the root cause of a job failure. Set to 1 or more to re-enable execution.
examples: Reset retries to 3 for failed job 'abc123' after fixing the service

getStacktrace.name: job_getStacktrace
getStacktrace.description: Retrieve the exception stacktrace for a failed job. Use to diagnose the root cause of job failures.

setJobDuedate.name: job_setDueDate
setJobDuedate.description: Update the due date of a job. Use to reschedule a timer or delay job execution to a specific time.

recalculateDuedate.name: job_recalculateDueDate
recalculateDuedate.description: Recalculate and reset the due date of a timer job based on its timer definition.

setJobPriority.name: job_setPriority
setJobPriority.description: Set the execution priority of a job. Higher priority jobs are executed first by the job executor.

deleteJob.name: job_delete
deleteJob.description: Delete a job by ID. Use with caution: deleting a job prevents its associated process from advancing or completing.

queryJobs.name: job_query
queryJobs.description: Query jobs using POST body filter for complex criteria. Equivalent to list but supports larger filter payloads.

queryJobsCount.name: job_queryCount
queryJobsCount.description: Count jobs using POST body filter.

updateSuspensionStateBy.name: job_setSuspensionBatch
updateSuspensionStateBy.description: Suspend or resume multiple jobs matching a process definition or job definition filter.

setJobRetriesAsyncOperation.name: job_setRetriesBatch
setJobRetriesAsyncOperation.description: Set retry counts on multiple jobs asynchronously using a batch operation.

getJobDefinitions.name: jobDefinition_list
getJobDefinitions.description: List job definitions with filters. Returns timer and async service task definitions with their current suspension state and override priority.

getJobDefinitionsCount.name: jobDefinition_count
getJobDefinitionsCount.description: Count job definitions matching filter criteria.

getJobDefinition.name: jobDefinition_get
getJobDefinition.description: Retrieve a single job definition by ID. Returns activity details, process definition, and suspension state.

updateSuspensionStateJobDefinition.name: jobDefinition_setSuspension
updateSuspensionStateJobDefinition.description: Suspend or resume all jobs for a job definition. Use includeJobs=true to also suspend/resume active job instances for this definition.
examples: Suspend all jobs of timer definition 'abc123' during deployment

setJobRetriesJobDefinition.name: jobDefinition_setRetries
setJobRetriesJobDefinition.description: Override the retry count for all future jobs of a job definition. Does not affect currently active jobs.

setJobPriorityJobDefinition.name: jobDefinition_setPriority
setJobPriorityJobDefinition.description: Set execution priority override for all jobs of a job definition.

queryJobDefinitions.name: jobDefinition_query
queryJobDefinitions.description: Query job definitions using POST body filter.

queryJobDefinitionsCount.name: jobDefinition_queryCount
queryJobDefinitionsCount.description: Count job definitions using POST body filter.

updateSuspensionStateJobDefinitions.name: jobDefinition_setSuspensionBatch
updateSuspensionStateJobDefinitions.description: Suspend or resume all job definitions matching a process definition filter.

createUser.name: user_create
createUser.description: Create a new Operaton user account with profile (id, firstName, lastName, email) and credentials (password). Returns confirmation on success.
examples: Create user 'john.doe' with name and email

getUsers.name: user_list
getUsers.description: Query Operaton users by id, firstName, lastName, email, or group membership. Returns profile info for each matching account.

getUserCount.name: user_count
getUserCount.description: Count Operaton users matching filter criteria. Supports the same filters as user_list.

getUserProfile.name: user_getProfile
getUserProfile.description: Retrieve the profile of a specific Operaton user by ID. Returns firstName, lastName, and email.

updateProfile.name: user_updateProfile
updateProfile.description: Update the profile of an existing Operaton user: firstName, lastName, or email. Returns confirmation on success.

updateCredentials.name: user_updatePassword
updateCredentials.description: Update the password for an existing Operaton user. Requires the current password for non-admin users. Returns confirmation on success.

deleteUser.name: user_delete
deleteUser.description: Delete an Operaton user account by ID. Returns confirmation on success. Returns a not-found error if the user does not exist.

unlockUser.name: user_unlock
unlockUser.description: Unlock a locked Operaton user account. Use when a user has been locked due to failed login attempts.

createGroup.name: group_create
createGroup.description: Create a new Operaton group with an id, name, and optional type. Groups are used to manage candidate task assignments and authorization.

getQueryGroups.name: group_list
getQueryGroups.description: Query Operaton groups by id, name, type, or member user ID. Returns group details for each matching group.
examples: List all groups where user 'john.doe' is a member

getGroup.name: group_get
getGroup.description: Retrieve details of a specific group by ID.

updateGroup.name: group_update
updateGroup.description: Update the name or type of an existing group.

deleteGroup.name: group_delete
deleteGroup.description: Delete an Operaton group by ID. Returns confirmation on success. Returns a not-found error if the group does not exist.

createGroupMember.name: group_addMember
createGroupMember.description: Add a user to an Operaton group by user ID and group ID. The user will receive task assignments for this group's candidate tasks.

deleteGroupMember.name: group_removeMember
deleteGroupMember.description: Remove a user from an Operaton group. The user will no longer receive task assignments for this group's candidate tasks.

postQueryGroups.name: group_query
postQueryGroups.description: Query groups using POST body filter for complex criteria.

queryGroupCount.name: group_queryCount
queryGroupCount.description: Count groups using POST body filter.

getHistoricProcessInstances.name: history_listProcessInstances
getHistoricProcessInstances.description: Query historic process instances by key, business key, state (active/completed), or date range. Returns id, definitionKey, startTime, endTime, duration, and state.
examples: List all completed 'loan-approval' instances in the last 30 days

getHistoricProcessInstancesCount.name: history_countProcessInstances
getHistoricProcessInstancesCount.description: Count historic process instances matching filter criteria. Use before listing to plan pagination.

getHistoricActivityInstances.name: history_listActivityInstances
getHistoricActivityInstances.description: Query historic activity instances for a process instance. Returns activityId, name, type, startTime, endTime, duration, and assignee for user tasks.
examples: Show all activities executed for process instance 'abc123'

getHistoricActivityInstancesCount.name: history_countActivityInstances
getHistoricActivityInstancesCount.description: Count historic activity instances matching filter criteria.

getHistoricActivityInstance.name: history_getActivityInstance
getHistoricActivityInstance.description: Retrieve a single historic activity instance by ID. Returns full execution details including start/end times and duration.

getHistoricTaskInstances.name: history_listTaskInstances
getHistoricTaskInstances.description: Query historic task instances by process instance, definition key, assignee, or completion state. Returns name, assignee, endTime, duration, and process instance ID.
examples: List all completed tasks for process instance 'abc123'

getHistoricTaskInstancesCount.name: history_countTaskInstances
getHistoricTaskInstancesCount.description: Count historic task instances matching filter criteria.

getHistoricVariableInstances.name: history_listVariableInstances
getHistoricVariableInstances.description: Query historic variable instances by process instance ID or variable name. Returns variable name, type, value, and the activity instance that set it.
examples: List all variables set during process instance 'abc123'

getHistoricVariableInstancesCount.name: history_countVariableInstances
getHistoricVariableInstancesCount.description: Count historic variable instances matching filter criteria.

getHistoricVariableInstance.name: history_getVariableInstance
getHistoricVariableInstance.description: Retrieve a single historic variable instance by ID.

getHistoricIncidents.name: history_listIncidents
getHistoricIncidents.description: Query historic incidents including resolved ones. Filter by process instance, type, or resolution state. Use for post-incident analysis.

getHistoricIncidentsCount.name: history_countIncidents
getHistoricIncidentsCount.description: Count historic incidents matching filter criteria.

getHistoricJobLogs.name: history_listJobLogs
getHistoricJobLogs.description: Query historic job execution logs for a process instance. Returns log entries with timestamp, job type, retries, and exception details.

getHistoricJobLogsCount.name: history_countJobLogs
getHistoricJobLogsCount.description: Count historic job log entries matching filter criteria.

queryUserOperationEntries.name: history_listUserOperations
queryUserOperationEntries.description: Query the user operation audit log. Returns who performed what operation (claim, complete, delete) on which entity and when.
examples: Show all operations performed by user 'admin' today

queryUserOperationCount.name: history_countUserOperations
queryUserOperationCount.description: Count user operation audit log entries matching filter criteria.

getHistoricDetails.name: history_listDetails
getHistoricDetails.description: Query historic detail records (variable updates, form properties) for process and activity instances.

getHistoricDetailsCount.name: history_countDetails
getHistoricDetailsCount.description: Count historic detail records matching filter criteria.

getDecisionDefinitions.name: decision_list
getDecisionDefinitions.description: List deployed DMN decision definitions. Filter by key, name, version, or tenant. Returns decision key, id, version, and deployment info.

getDecisionDefinitionsCount.name: decision_count
getDecisionDefinitionsCount.description: Count deployed decision definitions matching filter criteria.

getDecisionDefinitionByKey.name: decision_getByKey
getDecisionDefinitionByKey.description: Retrieve the latest deployed version of a decision definition by its key. Returns key, id, version, and deployment details.

getDecisionDefinitionById.name: decision_getById
getDecisionDefinitionById.description: Retrieve a specific decision definition by its unique ID.

getDecisionDefinitionDmnXmlByKey.name: decision_getXmlByKey
getDecisionDefinitionDmnXmlByKey.description: Retrieve the DMN XML of the latest version of a decision definition by key. Use to inspect the current decision table logic.

getDecisionDefinitionDmnXmlById.name: decision_getXmlById
getDecisionDefinitionDmnXmlById.description: Retrieve the DMN XML for a specific decision definition by ID.

evaluateDecisionByKey.name: decision_evaluate
evaluateDecisionByKey.description: Evaluate a deployed DMN decision table by key with typed input variables. Returns the matched rule outputs. Used to test decision logic through AI.

evaluateDecisionById.name: decision_evaluateById
evaluateDecisionById.description: Evaluate a specific version of a decision definition by ID with typed input variables.

getDecisionDefinitionByKeyAndTenantId.name: decision_getByKeyAndTenant
getDecisionDefinitionByKeyAndTenantId.description: Retrieve the latest decision definition version by key for a specific tenant.

getDecisionDefinitionDiagramByKey.name: decision_getDiagramByKey
getDecisionDefinitionDiagramByKey.description: Retrieve the diagram image for a decision definition by key.

getDecisionDefinitionDiagram.name: decision_getDiagramById
getDecisionDefinitionDiagram.description: Retrieve the diagram image for a decision definition by ID.

updateHistoryTimeToLiveByDecisionDefinit.name: decision_setHistoryTTL
updateHistoryTimeToLiveByDecisionDefinit.description: Update the history cleanup time-to-live (TTL) for a decision definition by key.

updateHistoryTimeToLiveByDecisionDefinit.name: decision_setHistoryTTLById
updateHistoryTimeToLiveByDecisionDefinit.description: Update the history cleanup TTL for a decision definition by ID.

evaluateDecisionByKeyAndTenant.name: decision_evaluateByKeyAndTenant
evaluateDecisionByKeyAndTenant.description: Evaluate a decision definition by key for a specific tenant.

getDecisionDefinitionDiagramByKeyAndTena.name: decision_getDiagramByKeyAndTenant
getDecisionDefinitionDiagramByKeyAndTena.description: Retrieve the diagram image for a decision definition by key and tenant.

getDecisionDefinitionDmnXmlByKeyAndTenan.name: decision_getXmlByKeyAndTenant
getDecisionDefinitionDmnXmlByKeyAndTenan.description: Retrieve the DMN XML for a decision definition by key and tenant.

updateHistoryTimeToLiveByDecisionDefinit.name: decision_setHistoryTTLByKeyAndTenant
updateHistoryTimeToLiveByDecisionDefinit.description: Update the history cleanup TTL for a decision definition by key and tenant.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitions.name: decisionRequirements_list
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitions.description: List deployed Decision Requirements Definitions (DRDs). DRDs describe dependencies between decision tables in a complex DMN model.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionsCount.name: decisionRequirements_count
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionsCount.description: Count decision requirements definitions matching filter criteria.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionByKey.name: decisionRequirements_getByKey
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionByKey.description: Retrieve a Decision Requirements Definition (DRD) by its key.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionById.name: decisionRequirements_getById
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionById.description: Retrieve a Decision Requirements Definition (DRD) by its ID.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDmnXmlB.name: decisionRequirements_getXmlByKey
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDmnXmlB.description: Retrieve the DMN XML for a Decision Requirements Definition by key.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDmnXmlB.name: decisionRequirements_getXmlById
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDmnXmlB.description: Retrieve the DMN XML for a Decision Requirements Definition by ID.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDiagram.name: decisionRequirements_getDiagramByKey
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDiagram.description: Retrieve the diagram image for a Decision Requirements Definition by key.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDiagram.name: decisionRequirements_getDiagramById
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDiagram.description: Retrieve the diagram image for a Decision Requirements Definition by ID.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionByKeyAn.name: decisionRequirements_getByKeyAndTenant
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionByKeyAn.description: Retrieve a Decision Requirements Definition by key and tenant.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDiagram.name: decisionRequirements_getDiagramByKeyAndTenant
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDiagram.description: Retrieve the diagram for a Decision Requirements Definition by key and tenant.

getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDmnXmlB.name: decisionRequirements_getXmlByKeyAndTenant
getDecisionRequirementsDefinitionDmnXmlB.description: Retrieve the DMN XML for a Decision Requirements Definition by key and tenant.

getProcessInstances.name: processInstance_list
getProcessInstances.description: List active process instances with optional filters: business key, definition key/id, state, variable values, and tenant. Returns id, definitionKey, state, and business key.
examples: List all active instances of 'loan-approval' key

getProcessInstancesCount.name: processInstance_count
getProcessInstancesCount.description: Count active process instances matching filter criteria. Supports same filters as list. Use before listing to plan pagination.

getProcessInstance.name: processInstance_get
getProcessInstance.description: Retrieve a single active process instance by ID. Returns id, definitionKey, businessKey, state, startTime, and tenant.

deleteProcessInstance.name: processInstance_delete
deleteProcessInstance.description: Delete (cancel) an active process instance by ID. Accepts an optional deletion reason that is recorded in history. Returns confirmation on success.

updateSuspensionStateById.name: processInstance_setSuspension
updateSuspensionStateById.description: Suspend or resume a process instance by ID. Set suspended=true to pause execution, suspended=false to resume. Suspended instances cannot advance until resumed.

getProcessInstanceVariables.name: processInstance_getVariables
getProcessInstanceVariables.description: Retrieve all variables for an active process instance. Returns each variable with its name, type, and value. Use to inspect current execution state.

modifyProcessInstanceVariables.name: processInstance_setVariables
modifyProcessInstanceVariables.description: Add or update multiple variables on an active process instance in a single call. Provide a map of variable names to typed values. Existing variables are overwritten.

getProcessInstanceVariable.name: processInstance_getVariable
getProcessInstanceVariable.description: Retrieve a single named variable from an active process instance. Returns the variable value, type, and scope.

setProcessInstanceVariable.name: processInstance_setVariable
setProcessInstanceVariable.description: Set a single named variable on an active process instance. Provide the variable name, value, and type. Overwrites any existing value for that variable.

deleteProcessInstanceVariable.name: processInstance_deleteVariable
deleteProcessInstanceVariable.description: Delete a single named variable from an active process instance. Use to remove variables that are no longer needed in the process context.

getActivityInstanceTree.name: processInstance_getActivityTree
getActivityInstanceTree.description: Retrieve the activity instance tree for a process instance. Shows current active activities, called sub-processes, and execution structure.

modifyProcessInstance.name: processInstance_modify
modifyProcessInstance.description: Modify a running process instance: cancel activities or start activities at specific points. Advanced operation for correcting execution paths.

queryProcessInstances.name: processInstance_query
queryProcessInstances.description: Query process instances using POST body for complex filter criteria. Equivalent to list but supports larger filter sets not suitable for query params.

queryProcessInstancesCount.name: processInstance_queryCount
queryProcessInstancesCount.description: Count process instances using POST body filter. Use for large or complex filter criteria.

correlateMessageAsyncOperation.name: processInstance_correlateMessage
correlateMessageAsyncOperation.description: Correlate a message asynchronously to multiple process instances matching a query. Use for bulk message correlation without waiting for completion.

deleteProcessInstancesAsyncOperation.name: processInstance_deleteBatch
deleteProcessInstancesAsyncOperation.description: Delete multiple process instances asynchronously using a query or explicit ID list. Returns a batch operation ID for monitoring.

updateSuspensionState.name: processInstance_setSuspensionBatch
updateSuspensionState.description: Suspend or resume multiple process instances matching a filter query in a single operation. Use for bulk state management.

updateSuspensionStateAsyncOperation.name: processInstance_setSuspensionAsync
updateSuspensionStateAsyncOperation.description: Suspend or resume multiple process instances asynchronously via batch operation. Returns a job ID for monitoring progress.

setVariablesAsyncOperation.name: processInstance_setVariablesAsync
setVariablesAsyncOperation.description: Set variables on multiple process instances asynchronously using a batch operation. Returns a job ID for monitoring.

getProcessInstanceComments.name: processInstance_getComments
getProcessInstanceComments.description: Retrieve all comments attached to a process instance. Returns comment text, author, and timestamp for each entry.

deleteProcessInstanceComments.name: processInstance_deleteComments
deleteProcessInstanceComments.description: Delete all comments from a process instance. Use with caution as this removes the full comment history.

deleteProcessInstanceComment.name: processInstance_deleteComment
deleteProcessInstanceComment.description: Delete a single comment by ID from a process instance. Use when a specific comment must be removed.

updateProcessInstanceComment.name: processInstance_updateComment
updateProcessInstanceComment.description: Update the text of a comment attached to a process instance.

getProcessInstanceVariableBinary.name: processInstance_getVariableBinary
getProcessInstanceVariableBinary.description: Retrieve the binary data of a file or byte array variable from a process instance.

setProcessInstanceVariableBinary.name: processInstance_setVariableBinary
setProcessInstanceVariableBinary.description: Upload binary data as a variable on a process instance. Use for file or byte array variables.

modifyProcessInstanceAsyncOperation.name: processInstance_modifyAsync
modifyProcessInstanceAsyncOperation.description: Modify a running process instance asynchronously. Cancel or start activities without blocking. Returns a batch job ID.
